status_detail:
HAR CAPTURE TASK COMPLETE with multiple new findings. (1) Engine NOW intercepts /api/streamingSearch (chat path), not just /api/eventLogger telemetry -- refines Cycle 94 finding. Both endpoints get TypeError: Failed to fetch when PII pattern present. (2) Block works at TCP layer: PII path has 0 headers + 0 body (engine RST). (3) CAPTURED native SSE schema for benign reference (logged-out 'log in' message): `event: youChatToken
data: {"youChatToken": "#### Please [log in](https://you.com/signin) to use You.com.\n\n#### Check out our plans here: https://you.com/pricing"}

event: done
data: I'm Mr. Meeseeks. Look at me.

`. Format: text/event-stream;charset=utf-8 with event types youChatToken + done. (4) UI on PII block: you.com generic error '🤖 Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later. Our team is looking into it. ... Error ID: ec29e5c6-d215-4bc2-9b2b-767b64b8220a|5e7e73b6-0bd2-41b2-8a49-70a2d6bccd5b|2026-04-28T06:58:33.552Z'. No APF custom warning rendered.
streamingSearch_status: (failed) -- engine RST, JS sees TypeError: Failed to fetch
streamingSearch_response_body_format: SSE (text/event-stream;charset=utf-8) -- known from benign sample reference

eventLogger_intercept_note: engine intercepts BOTH endpoints when PII pattern present, refining Cycle 94 finding (which thought only eventLogger was intercepted)
generic_error_text: 🤖 Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later. Our team is looking into it. If you would like to follow up on this issue, please visit our Feedback Portal or let us know on our Discord. Please include the following Error ID in your message: ec29e5c6-d215-4bc2-9b2b-767b64b8220a|5e7e73b6-0bd2-41b2-8a49-70a2d6bccd5b|2026-04-28T06:58:33.552Z
intercept_method: TCP RST (block at connection layer, not response substitution)
progress_vs_618: BETTER -- first-time confirmation that engine matches PII on chat path (#618 was unclear) AND first-time capture of native SSE schema for /api/streamingSearch (logged-out reference)
schema_reference_for_dev:
Engine should switch from connection RST to body substitution returning Content-Type text/event-stream with `event: youChatToken
data: {"youChatToken":"<warning>"}

event: done
data: blocked

` -- this will render the warning inside you.com's existing chat bubble instead of the current generic 'Sorry, something went wrong' fallback.
recommendation_for_dev: v1: switch you.com intercept from TCP RST to SSE body substitution. Use the captured benign schema as template -- only need 2 events (youChatToken with warning text + done).

Concrete envelope: `HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: text/event-stream;charset=utf-8

event: youChatToken
data: {"youChatToken":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다."}

event: done
data: blocked

`
Once SSE substitution works, expect: warning text renders inside you.com's normal chat bubble area (not generic error). Same UI/UX as a real you.com response, just with our warning content.
Note: an authenticated session may use richer event types -- worth capturing follow-up benign with login if available.
Files: response_body.txt is empty (PII intercepted). Benign reference is in _benign.json artifact.
artifacts: files/632/response_body.txt (empty -- PII intercepted at TCP layer)
files/632/_benign.json (215-byte native SSE reference -- gold for dev)
notes: Cycle 95 WSA v2 -- you har_capture for streamingSearch. SUCCESS = capture done + 2 new findings (engine intercepts chat path too; native SSE schema captured for substitution template). Subagent 6m, exceeded 5min soft.
